Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 py -c "
import sys, time
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, TimeoutError as PWTimeout
BASE = 'http://localhost:8004'
def wait_idle\(page, timeout=8000\):
    try: page.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle', timeout=timeout\)
    except PWTimeout: pass

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
    ctx = browser.new_context\(viewport={'width': 1440, 'height': 900}\)
    page = ctx.new_page\(\)
    paths = ['/Houses/Audit', '/Houses/List', '/Houses/Verification', '/Agents/ACN', '/Agents/List', '/Agents/Performance', '/Finance', '/Operations', '/Settings', '/Users/Agents', '/Users/CEnd']
    for path in paths:
        page.goto\(f'{BASE}{path}', timeout=8000\)
        wait_idle\(page, 5000\)
        time.sleep\(0.5\)
        c = page.content\(\)
        print\(f'  {path}: {len\(c\)}'\)
    browser.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 py -c "
import sys, time
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, TimeoutError as PWTimeout
BASE = 'http://localhost:8004'
def wait_idle\(page, timeout=8000\):
    try: page.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle', timeout=timeout\)
    except PWTimeout: pass
with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
    ctx = browser.new_context\(viewport={'width': 1440, 'height': 900}\)
    page = ctx.new_page\(\)
    paths = ['/Finance/Commission', '/Finance/Reports', '/Finance/Withdrawal', '/Operations/Banners', '/Operations/Content', '/Settings/CommissionRules', '/Settings/General', '/Settings/Roles']
    for path in paths:
        page.goto\(f'{BASE}{path}', timeout=8000\)
        wait_idle\(page, 5000\)
        time.sleep\(0.5\)
        c = page.content\(\)
        print\(f'  {path}: {len\(c\)}'\)
    browser.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
